name: Miya
intro: Miya, the Moonlight Archer, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Moon Blessing
abilities.description: Buff | Attack Effects: 25% | Lifesteal Ratio: 0% Each time Miya hits a target with her Basic Attack , she gains 5% Attack Speed for 4 seconds. Stacks up to 5 times. After reaching full stacks, Miya summons a Moonlight Shadow with each Basic Attack that deals 30 (+25% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and inherits a portion of Attack Effects . Skill terms Attack Speed Current Attack Speed = Base Attack Speed + Extra Attack Speed × Attack Speed Ratio. The current total Attack Speed determines the number of attacks per second (capped at 3 attacks per second). Crit Rate Chance to cause Crit Damage with Basic ATK (including Physical and Magic). The default is 0. A Crit Damage is guaranteed when it is over 100%. Some skills trigger this effect. For example: Layla's Malefic Bomb and the Typhoon effect of Windtalker. Attack Effect Both Physical and Magic Basic Attacks can trigger Attack Effects Attack Effects include the "Devour" effect of the Demon Hunter Sword equipment, the 'Weakness Finder" Talent effect, etc.

abilities.name: Moon Arrow
abilities.description: Buff AOE | Attack Effects: 20% | Lifesteal Ratio: 0% Miya shoots two extra arrows with each Basic Attack , dealing 10–35 (+100% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to the target enemy and 30% damage to nearby targets. This effect lasts 4 seconds. Each extra arrow inherits a portion of Attack Effects . Skill terms Physical Basic Attack Deal Physical Damage to enemies. Triggers ATK Effects and Lifesteal. Attack Effect Both Physical and Magic Basic Attacks can trigger Attack Effects Attack Effects include the "Devour" effect of the Demon Hunter Sword equipment, the 'Weakness Finder" Talent effect, etc.

abilities.name: Arrow of Eclipse
abilities.description: CC AOE Miya launches an empowered arrow on the target area, dealing 270–420 (+45% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies within and immobilizing them for 1.2 seconds. The arrow then splits into 6 scattering minor arrows, each dealing 40–105 (+20% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to the first enemy hit and slowing them by 30% for 2 seconds. Skill terms Immobilize Low level Crowd Control: Prevents a target from moving or using Blink/Charge skills. Cannot interrupt skills. Physical Damage Skill Deal Physical DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp.

abilities.name: Hidden Moonlight
abilities.description: Conceal Remove CC Miya removes all debuffs on her and conceals herself, gaining 65% extra Movement Speed . This state lasts 2 seconds or until she launches an attack. Miya gains full stacks of Moon Blessing upon leaving the state. Skill terms Exceptional Status Debuff applied to the enemy. Conceal Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%).

When this energy reach 100, his next Basic Attack deals 200% Crit Damage and restores 100 (+10 × Hero Level) (+15% Extra HP) . Leomord's Basic Attacks cannot normally Crit, and every 1% Crit Chance is converted into 1% Crit Damage. Mounted State : Each Oath Keeper energy gain is increased by 200%. Skill terms Crit Damage The ratio of Crit Damage to Base Damage. The default is 200%. Crit Damage Dealt = Original Damage × (200% + All Crit Damage Increase% - All Crit Damage Decrease%).

abilities.name: Phantom Steed
abilities.description: Summon Morph Leomord summons Barbiel to rush to him, dealing Template:Sscale to all enemies in its path. If Barbiel comes in contact with Leomord, they will enter the Mounted State, gaining 50% Movement Speed that decays over 2 seconds. Mounted State : Leomord gains a brand-new set of skills, and his Basic Attack can be used while moving and hits a circular area to deal AOE damage. Leomord also gains extra 70 Movement Speed and 30–110 Physical & Magic Defense . This lasts 10 seconds. Skill terms Displacement Target Displacement; Can interrupt certain skills and Blink or Charge effects (interrupts the same skills as Knock Airborne effect). Including but not limited to Knockback, Drag and effects that pull targets together. Physical Damage Skill Deal Physical DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. abilities.description: Buff Damage dealt by Hanzo's Basic Attacks and skills inflicts a stack of Dark Ninjutsu on the target, up to 5 stacks. Ninjutsu: Demon Feast can only be cast on targets with full stacks of Dark Ninjutsu .

name: Belerick
intro: Belerick, the Guard of Nature, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.description: Speed Up Heal Belerick increases his Movement Speed by 80% and strengthens his next Basic Attack . (The Movement Speed gain will decay in 2 seconds.) This enhanced Basic Attack deals 300 (+60% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and slows the target by 60% for 1.4 seconds. Belerick also regenerates HP equal to 240 plus 10% of his lost HP. name: Kimmy
intro: Kimmy, the Hoverjet Outrider, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Aerial Dominance
abilities.description: Damage Kimmy can move and aim in different directions when using her Spray Gun, but cannot lock on to a specific enemy. Kimmy's Spray Gun attack deals (+22%% Total Physical Attack) (+27%% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage . Hitting enemy heroes/non-hero units restores 6/3 Starlium. At max Starlium, Kimmy's Basic Attacks are enhanced to deal (+27%% Total Physical Attack) (+32%% Total Magic Power) damage and pierce through targets. Kimmy doesn't stop moving while shooting and no longer benefits from Attack Speed Bonus. Every 1% Attack Speed she gains is converted to 1 Magic Power.

abilities.name: Anti-Grav Thruster
abilities.description: Speed Up Buff | Spell Vamp Ratio: 50% Kimmy uses her jetpack to take flight, removing and becoming immune to Slow Effects. She can pass through terrain and gains 90% Movement Speed for 1 second. During the flight, she fires 4 Chemical Bolts at nearby enemies, each dealing 20 (+25%% Total Physical Attack) (+30%% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and slowing them by 50% for 0.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Starlium Beam
abilities.description: CC Damage | Spell Vamp Ratio: 50% Kimmy fires a Starlium Beam in the target direction that immobilizes enemies in its path and deals 300 (+50%% Total Physical Attack) (+60%% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage for 2 seconds. Gain 20 Starlium for each enemy hero hit. Skill terms Immobilize Low level Crowd Control: Prevents a target from moving or using Blink/Charge skills. Cannot interrupt skills.

abilities.description: AOE CC | Spell Vamp Ratio: 50% Kimmy charges and fires a Traction Pulse in a target direction. Upon hitting an enemy or reaching its max range, it explodes to deal 200 (+60%% Total Physical Attack) (+72%% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to nearby enemies and creates a force field that slows enemies within by 75%. After 1 second, the field contracts, pulling all enemy heroes to its center and dealing 15% of their current HP as Magic Damage. Gain 40 Starlium for each enemy hero hit. name: Harith
